_comment: Input fixture for the 4 quality drift kinds (faithfulness, answer-relevancy, contextual-precision, contextual-recall) plus score-consistency + llm-base. The DeepEval LLM judge measures the classifier's actual_output (real topics returned by the in-cluster classifier) against expected_output and retrieval_context. No score values appear in this file — only inputs.
query: Which programming concepts are covered by the source material?

chunks.content: Object-oriented programming uses classes and inheritance to model behavior.
Polymorphism enables one interface to serve multiple types via dynamic dispatch.
Encapsulation hides internal state behind a public method contract.
